product_overview: BioPara is a Flutter mobile app for patients and admins to manage health consultations, product shopping, appointments, and realtime communication. It supports a patient experience for onboarding, login, chat, shopping, booking, and profile management, plus an admin workspace for overseeing patients, appointments, reports, and conversations.
core_goals: Let patients sign in and access their account using phone-based authentication.
Enable patients to browse natural products, manage a cart, and place orders.
Allow patients to chat with an admin or doctor in realtime, including media and voice messages.
Let patients book and review appointments with the doctor.
Provide patients with profile management and access to their order and appointment history.
Give admins a dashboard to review patients, appointments, reports, and chats.

features.name: Patient Authentication and Onboarding
features.description: New and returning patients can start the app, complete onboarding, and sign in with a Moroccan phone number using OTP verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /splash -> Observe the app loading -> Continue to onboarding or login based on app state
Navigate to /onboarding -> Review the introductory screens -> Continue to the login flow
Navigate to /login -> Enter phone number -> Request OTP -> Navigate to /otp -> Enter the 6-digit code -> Complete sign in and access the patient experience

features.name: Patient Realtime Chat
features.description: Authenticated patients can send and receive realtime messages with the admin or doctor, including text and media interactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> View the conversation thread -> Type a text message -> Send the message -> See it appear in the chat history
Navigate to /chat -> Start recording a voice message -> Send the recording -> See the voice message in the conversation
Navigate to /chat -> Attach an image or file -> Send the attachment -> See it delivered in the thread
Navigate to /chat -> Open a received link message -> Preview the linked content -> Return to the conversation

features.name: Product Shop and Product Details
features.description: Authenticated patients can browse herbal and natural products, search and refine the catalog, and view individual product details.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> Browse the product grid -> Search for a product by name -> Apply category or price preferences -> Sort the visible results -> Open a product detail page
Navigate to /product-detail -> Review product information -> Add the product to the wishlist -> Return to shopping
Navigate to /shop -> Open a product from the catalog -> Review the product detail view -> Add the product to the cart

features.name: Shopping Cart and Checkout
features.description: Authenticated patients can review items selected from the shop, adjust quantities, and complete checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Review cart items and total price -> Increase or decrease item quantities -> Remove an item if needed -> Proceed to checkout -> Complete the order flow
Navigate to /shop -> Select a product -> Add it to the cart -> Navigate to /cart -> Confirm the item appears in the cart -> Continue to checkout

features.name: Order History and Order Details
features.description: Authenticated patients can review past purchases and inspect the details of individual orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /orders -> Review the list of previous orders -> Open an order -> View the order details and item information
Navigate to /order-details -> Inspect the selected order -> Review status, items, and totals -> Return to the orders list

features.name: Patient Profile Management
features.description: Authenticated patients can view their profile, update personal details, upload an avatar, and access related account information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile information and account stats -> Open profile editing -> Update name, phone number, or handle -> Save changes
Navigate to /profile -> Tap the avatar area -> Upload a new profile photo -> Return to the updated profile view
Navigate to /profile -> Open order history or appointments from the profile context -> Review linked account activity

features.name: Appointment Booking and History
features.description: Authenticated patients can schedule appointments and review their past or upcoming visits.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> Select an appointment date -> Select a time -> Confirm the booking -> See the appointment added to the schedule
Navigate to /my-appointments -> Review past and upcoming appointments -> Open the booking history -> Return to the patient area

features.name: Patient App Settings and Legal Info
features.description: Authenticated patients can open app settings and review the privacy policy.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Review available app preferences -> Change supported settings -> Return to the previous screen
Navigate to /privacy-policy -> Read the privacy policy content -> Return to the app

features.name: Patient Voice and Video Calls
features.description: Authenticated patients can start and manage voice or video calls from the chat experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Start a call with the admin or doctor -> Move to the /call screen -> Toggle mute or camera during the call -> End the call
Navigate to /call -> Receive an incoming call -> Accept the call -> Participate in the conversation -> End the call

features.name: Admin Authentication and Dashboard
features.description: Admins can sign in with email and password and access the dashboard workspace after admin verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-login -> Enter email and password -> Sign in -> Pass the admin check -> Access the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin-login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit the form -> See the login error state

features.name: Admin Dashboard Navigation
features.description: Authenticated admins can move through the main dashboard sections to monitor home stats, patients, appointments, and reports.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-dashboard -> View the dashboard home overview -> Switch to the patients section -> Switch to the appointments section -> Switch to the reports section
Navigate to /admin-dashboard -> Review the unread message indicator -> Open the patients section -> Select a patient to continue to chat

features.name: Admin Patient Management and Chat
features.description: Authenticated admins can review the patient list, open conversations, and manage patient interactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-patients -> Browse the patient list -> Open a patient conversation -> Continue the discussion in chat
Navigate to /admin-chat -> Review the selected patient conversation -> Send a message or media reply -> Observe the updated thread

features.name: Admin Appointment and Reports Management
features.description: Authenticated admins can review appointments and analytics from the dashboard workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-appointments -> Review scheduled appointments -> Inspect appointment entries -> Return to the dashboard
Navigate to /admin-reports -> Review analytics and report summaries -> Compare available metrics -> Return to the main admin workspace

tech_stack: Supabase (Backend as a Service - Auth, DB, Storage, Realtime)

routes.description: Patient app splash/loading screen
Patient login via phone number (Morocco +212) with OTP
OTP verification screen after phone login
First-time user onboarding flow
Main patient chat screen with the admin/doctor (realtime messaging, media, voice)
Product shop with categories (herbs, teas, supplements, oils, honey), search, filter, cart
Individual product page with details, add to cart, wishlist
Shopping cart with item management and checkout
Patient order history list
Single order detail view
Patient profile with avatar, stats (messages, orders, last appointment)
Edit patient name, phone, and handle
Book an appointment with the doctor
Patient appointment history
App settings
Privacy policy page
Voice/video call screen using ZegoCloud
Admin login via email and password with is_admin check from profiles table
Admin dashboard with side navigation rail (Home, Patients, Appointments, Reports)
Admin home tab with stats, recent activity, unread messages
Admin patient list with chat access
Admin appointment management
Admin analytics and reports
Admin chat with a specific patient (realtime, media, voice, AI)

features.name: Patient Phone Login (OTP)
features.description: Patient signs in with Moroccan phone number (+212), receives SMS OTP, and verifies
user_interactions: Enter phone number in input field (digits only, +212 prefix auto-added)
Tap "التالي — إرسال الرمز" button to send OTP

features.name: Admin Email/Password Login
features.description: Admin logs in via email and password, system checks is_admin flag in profiles table
user_interactions: See error snackbar on invalid credentials
Tap "نسيت كلمة المرور؟" for password reset

features.name: Product Shop
features.description: Browse and search herbal/natural products by categories with filtering and sorting
user_interactions: Filter by category (herbs, tea, supplements, oils, honey)
Sort by popularity, price, or newest
View product grid with images, prices, ratings
Tap product card to view details

features.name: Shopping Cart & Checkout
features.description: Add products to cart, manage quantities, and proceed to checkout
user_interactions: Add product to cart from shop or product detail
View floating cart bar with count and total price
Open cart screen to see all items

features.name: Realtime Chat (Patient)
features.description: Patient chats with admin/doctor via realtime messaging with media, voice, links

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin views stats, manages patients, appointments, reports via side navigation
user_interactions: View dashboard home with stats cards
Navigate between tabs (Home, Patients, Appointments, Reports)
See unread message badge on patients tab
View patient list and open chat

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Patient views/edits profile, uploads avatar, sees stats
user_interactions: View profile header with avatar, name, membership badge
Tap avatar to upload new photo
View stats (messages count, orders count, last appointment)

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: Patient books appointments with the doctor
user_interactions: View list of past and upcoming appointments

features.name: Voice/Video Calls
features.description: Patient initiates voice or video calls with admin using ZegoCloud

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite is designed for web frontend testing but this is a Flutter mobile app
known_limitations.impact: Browser-based E2E testing cannot directly test native Flutter UI, only Flutter Web builds

known_limitations.issue: Filter/sort in shop screen is UI-only, does not persist or query backend with filters
known_limitations.impact: Sorting and price range filter only modify local state display, not queried from server
